content_type.description: Select the content type of the items to retrieve.

detail_type.description: Select the granularity of the information about each item.

domain.description: Only return items from a particular `domain`.

search.description: Only return items whose title or url contain the `search` string.

since.description: Only return items modified since the given timestamp.

sort.description: Sort retrieved items by the given criteria.

state.description: Select the state of the items to retrieve.

tag.description: Return only items tagged with this tag name. Use _untagged_ for retrieving only untagged items.

base_url.description: Placeholder base URL used only to construct the engine runtime before the Tier-2 hook delegates to the legacy connector.

mode.description: Set to fixture for credential-free legacy fixture tests.
